build.details: Build completed successfully with expected performance warnings (editor.js 328 KiB, entrypoint size warnings). No TypeScript errors.

lint.details: Lint check passed for FullWidthMedia block. Found 4 pre-existing warnings in FullWidthMedia.tsx (__experimental API usage, React hooks dependencies, BaseControl without id) - these are consistent with other blocks in the theme and are not introduced by the accessibility changes.
warnings: BaseControl without id when label is passed (line 221)

registration.details: All required files present and valid

attributes.details: All attributes defined correctly with proper types and defaults

tested.notes: All content renders correctly with 2 buttons
Long heading (100+ chars), description (500+ chars), and button labels render without overflow issues
Block renders correctly without eyebrow field
Block renders correctly without buttons array
Media container properly hidden when no image or video is set
Self-hosted video (MP4) with poster image and play button
YouTube embed with poster image overlay
Vimeo embed with poster image overlay

testsRun.description: Clicking play button on YouTube video with poster replaces poster with YouTube iframe with autoplay=1
testsRun.verified: Play button hides, iframe is injected into .embed-video-container, video autoplays

testsRun.description: Clicking play button on Vimeo video with poster replaces poster with Vimeo iframe with autoplay=1
testsRun.verified: Play button hides, iframe is injected into .embed-video-container, video autoplays

semanticHtml.details: Proper use of section element, h2 headings, button elements, and semantic markup

verified.present: All 12 sections have aria-labelledby when heading is present
Fallback aria-label added when heading is empty
All play icon spans (sections 2, 3, 5) have aria-hidden='true'
All iframes (sections 4, 6) have title attribute. Dynamically-injected iframes in JS also have title attribute.
verified.file: FullWidthMedia.php line 95, FullWidthMedia.tsx line 114-116 & 127-129, FullWidthMedia.js line 30 & 32

verified.present: Poster images have alt='' (decorative) since button has aria-label

keyboardNavigation.details: Play button is keyboard accessible (native button element), video controls are keyboard accessible (native HTML5 video controls)

images.details: All images have alt text. Poster images inside play buttons correctly use alt='' since the button has aria-label.

markupDuplication.details: No responsive duplication detected. Block uses CSS responsive classes (sm:, md:) without duplicating DOM elements.

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX and PHP produce identical structure and conditionals

verified.tsx: w-full h-[294px] sm:h-[600px] rounded-3xl bg-charcoal p-[18px] sm:p-8
verified.php: w-full h-[294px] sm:h-[600px] rounded-3xl bg-charcoal p-[18px] sm:p-8

verified.tsx: aria-label, aria-hidden, title on all elements
verified.php: aria-label, aria-hidden, title on all elements

attributeExtraction.details: PHP template correctly uses auto-extracted variables from theme helper (no manual $attributes['key'] assignments found)

innerBlocks.reason: Block does not use inner blocks

mediaPlaceholders.details: All placeholder media IDs replaced with real media IDs (19, 18, 34)

issues.description: PHP template missing @var docblock for camelCase attribute variables
issues.fix: Add @var docblock at the top of the PHP file to prevent PHP_CodeSniffer warnings for camelCase variables like $eyebrow, $heading, $mediaType, $videoSource, $videoFile, $videoId, $posterImage
issues.example:
<?php
/**
 * FullWidthMedia frontend template.
 *
 * Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):
 * @var string $anchor
 * @var string $eyebrow
 * @var string $heading
 * @var string $description
 * @var array $buttons
 * @var string $mediaType
 * @var array $image
 * @var string $videoSource
 * @var int $videoFile
 * @var string $videoId
 * @var array $posterImage
 *
 * Also available:
 * @var string $children Inner blocks content
 * @var WP_Block $block Block instance
 */
?>

passedChecks: Block registers correctly with all required files
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults
All edge cases handled properly (minimal content, full content, long content, empty optional fields, all video sources)
Play button interaction works correctly for YouTube and Vimeo videos
All accessibility fixes verified: aria-label on play buttons, aria-hidden on decorative icons, title on iframes, alt='' on decorative images, aria-labelledby on sections
TSX and PHP produce identical structure and classes
PHP template uses auto-extracted attributes (no manual extraction)
Test page has 12 instances matching spec with real media IDs (not placeholders)
Interactive video playback tested and verified with screenshots
